steps.title: Set up equations from the constraints
steps.content: The string is cut into two parts that sum to the total length, so $x + y = 96$. We're also told that $x$ is 6 more than 4 times $y$, which translates to $x = 4y + 6$.

steps.title: Substitute to eliminate x and solve for y
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 4y + 6$ into the equation $x + y = 96$:
$$(4y + 6) + y = 96$$Combine like terms:
$$5y + 6 = 96$$Subtract 6 from both sides:
$$5y = 90$$
$$y = 18$$

steps.title: Find x and identify the answer
steps.content:
Use the relationship $x = 4y + 6$ with $y = 18$:
$$x = 4(18) + 6 = 72 + 6 = 78$$That matches choice D — D is correct.
